original:
This bank of repairbots waits securely inside the hull the order to scuttle out and repair damage damage to the ship’s armor in the blink of eye. After use, they require roughly ten minutes to recharge their batteries and gather more material to patch gaps.

(~3500 armor)
(1x per fight)

original: Swarms of spider-like repair bots scuttle across the surface of "+{var0}.getCombatName()+", patching damage.
